generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output (τ_M) based on input current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component receiving torque (τ_M) from the motor and transmitting modified torque (τ_G) to the cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox receiving torque (τ_G) from the gearwheel and producing output torque (τ_out) for the first axis."
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller managing axis control (position, speed, acceleration) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PrimaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft measuring angular position (r_M) and enabling velocity/acceleration derivation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the secondary axis (behind the gearbox) measuring output angular position (r_out) for backlash compensation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputPositionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryEncoder
]

instance OutputPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram defining structural components (Motor, Gearbox) and their interconnections (Rotational/Current flows) for the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram instantiating the first axis as a composition of PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, and CycloidalGearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model representing frictionless behavior of the first axis (motor, gearwheel, gearbox) for baseline comparison."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionInclusiveModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable Simulink model incorporating friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for realistic torque/velocity simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model combining Coulomb (static/kinetic) and viscous friction components implemented in Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model incorporating Stribeck effect (velocity-dependent friction) for lubricated systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box Dahl friction model capturing dynamic friction behavior with state-dependent hysteresis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box LuGre friction model with bristle deflection dynamics for advanced friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance ManufacturerDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-provided dynamics models computing torque/velocity from sensor data (e.g., gearbox output torque calculations)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink processing component (Simulation_M) generating simulated torque/velocity traces (τ̂_M, ω̂_M) for the motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance GearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink processing component (Simulation_GW) generating simulated torque/velocity traces (τ̂_G, ω̂_G) for the gearwheel."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink processing component (Simulation_GB) generating simulated torque/velocity traces (τ̂_out, ω̂_out) for the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor input current (I_M) streamed via MQTT from MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor angular position (r_M) derived from PrimaryEncoder for velocity/acceleration calculations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of output angular position (r_out) streamed via MQTT from SecondaryEncoder for backlash compensation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data (τ_M) computed from I_M using manufacturer dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω_M) computed from r_M using numerical differentiation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedGearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ_G) at gearwheel output computed from τ_M and gear ratio."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedGearwheelAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω_G) at gearwheel output computed from ω_M and gear ratio."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived output torque (τ_out) computed from τ_G using cycloidal gearbox dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedGearwheelTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedOutputAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived output angular velocity (ω_out) computed from r_out using numerical differentiation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredOutputPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque traces (τ̂_M) generated by MotorSimulationModel for frictionless/friction-inclusive scenarios."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity traces (ω̂_M) generated by MotorSimulationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque traces (τ̂_G) generated by GearwheelSimulationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity traces (ω̂_G) generated by GearwheelSimulationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearwheelSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque traces (τ̂_out) generated by GearboxSimulationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity traces (ω̂_out) generated by GearboxSimulationModel."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxSimulationModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML toolset for structural/behavioral modeling via Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams."
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService, DigitalShadowTraceabilityService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for executable friction and dynamics simulations of the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelSimulationService, MultiPhysicsAnalysisService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission (I_M, r_out) from physical system to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataAcquisitionService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell framework linking data traces to models and enabling semantic traceability."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalShadowTraceabilityService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) generating simulated data traces from models."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataDerivationService, FrictionModelComparisonService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard displaying simulated vs. measured data traces (torque, angular velocity) for deviation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ModelBasedSystemsEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE methodology (RFLP, OOSEM, or SMArDT) for multi-abstraction-level modeling of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCreationService, DigitalShadowImplementationService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DSRM structuring data traces, models, and processing components for the digital shadow implementation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalShadowImplementationService
]

// C6: Services
instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creation and maintenance of SysML structural/behavioral models for the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of Simulink friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for torque/velocity simulation."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelComparisonInsight, FrictionModelSelectionAction
]

instance MultiPhysicsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Combining structural models (SysML) with behavioral models (Simulink) to explain deviations between simulated and measured data."
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicsDeviationInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataAcquisitionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Streaming of sensor data (I_M, r_out) via MQTT for real-time processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataInsight
]

instance DataDerivationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation of derived data traces (τ_M, ω_M, τ_G, ω_G, τ_out, ω_out) from raw sensor data using dynamics models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DerivedDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Display of simulated vs. measured data traces (torque, angular velocity) in a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualDeviationInsight
]

instance DigitalShadowTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Semantic linking of data points to their sources (e.g., I_M → motor current channel) via SysML models and metadata."
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance FrictionModelComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models to detect friction loss."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance ModelCreationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Development of executable Simulink models for frictionless and friction-inclusive behavior of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance DigitalShadowImplementationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implementation of the Digital Shadow Reference Model with concrete classes (FrictionShadow, FrictionDerivation, Simulation_M)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ImplementationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural representation of the first axis components (Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox) and their interconnections."
]

instance FrictionModelComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison results between simulated and measured friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for accuracy assessment."
]

instance FrictionModelSelectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Selection of the most accurate friction model (white-box or black-box) for real-time control adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicsDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Explanation of deviations between simulated and measured data traces due to multi-physics effects (friction, backlash, dynamics)."
]

instance RealTimeDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time availability of sensor data (I_M, r_out) and derived traces (τ, ω) for immediate analysis."
]

instance DerivedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed torque/velocity data traces (τ_M, ω_M, τ_G, ω_G, τ_out, ω_out) derived from raw sensor measurements."
]

instance VisualDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of deviations between simulated and measured torque/velocity traces in the unified dashboard."
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic traceability links between data points (e.g., I_M → motor current channel) and their processing components."
]

instance FrictionModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox via deviation analysis."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of Simulink models against measured data to ensure fidelity of frictionless/friction-inclusive simulations."
]

instance ImplementationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Successful implementation of the Digital Shadow Reference Model with populated data and processing components."
]

instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of static friction effects causing motion initiation delays in the first axis."
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of kinetic friction losses during continuous motion of the first axis."
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Characterization of viscous friction effects proportional to velocity in the gearbox."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of friction models based on live data to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear or anomalies via deviations in torque/velocity data for predictive maintenance."
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of physical relationships (e.g., how friction affects torque transmission) between components."
]

instance DataDrivenModelImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Iterative improvement of friction models using data-driven approaches for future digital twin iterations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in **real-time** with:
  - **Live data streaming** via MQTT (time-series sensor data).
  - **Dynamic model exchange**: Friction models are updated during operation to account for wear, tool changes, or application variations.
  - **Synchronization**: Simulated data traces (e.g., *ˆr_M*, *ˆr_G*, *ˆr_out*) are computed in parallel with measured data for continuous comparison.
  No explicit time-scale for synchronization with the physical system is specified beyond real-time operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - **Physical System**: MABI MAX 100 robot (first axis: motor + gearboxes).
  - **Digital Shadow Components**:
    - **Data Sources**: MQTT-streamed sensor data (*I_M*, *r_out*) and derived data traces.
    - **Models**: SysML structural models + Simulink behavioral models.
    - **Processing**: Simulation components (*Simulation_M*, *Simulation_GW*, *Simulation_GB*) generating *ˆr_M*, *ˆr_G*, *ˆr_out*.
    - **Visualization**: Dashboard for comparing simulated (*ˆr_*) and measured (*r_*) data traces.
  - **Orchestration**:
    - **One-way data flow** (physical → digital shadow).
    - **No closed-loop control**: The digital shadow does not influence the physical system directly.
    - **Traceability**: Data points are linked to their sources and processing components via the DSRM."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the **as-operated** lifecycle phase, focusing on:
  - **Real-time monitoring** of the first axis during operation.
  - **Continuous model refinement** to adapt to changes (e.g., wear, tool variations).
  - **No explicit design/manufacturing phases**: The digital shadow is built post-deployment to improve operational accuracy.
  The SysML models and Simulink simulations serve as **behavioral representations** of the as-operated system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model Validation**:
    - Comparison of **simulated data traces** (*ˆr_M*, *ˆr_G*, *ˆr_out*) with **measured data** (*r_M*, *r_G*, *r_out*) to detect friction-induced deviations.
    - Use of **manufacturer-provided dynamics models** for torque/velocity calculations.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**:
    - **Two encoders per axis** reduce backlash and positional uncertainty by comparing motor and secondary encoder readings.
    - **Friction models** (white-box/black-box) are continuously updated to account for operational changes (wear, tool variations).
  - **Traceability**:
    - **Metadata** links data traces to their sources (e.g., *I_M* → motor current sensor).
    - **Processing components** (*Simulation_M*, etc.) document how simulated data is generated.
  - **Verification**:
    - **SysML models** define structural/behavioral consistency.
    - **Simulink simulations** validate friction model outputs against measured data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical system and digital shadow includes:
  - **Data Transmission**:
    - **MQTT protocol** for streaming time-series sensor data (*I_M*, *r_out*) in real-time.
    - **No explicit network architecture** is described beyond MQTT for data acquisition.
  - **Data Processing**:
    - **Simulink models** run on a separate processing system (not specified) to compute simulated data traces.
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** enables semantic linking of data traces to models.
  - **Integration**:
    - **SysML models** and **Simulink simulations** are integrated via a **unified dashboard** for visualization.
    - **No remote execution**: The digital shadow does not send commands back to the physical system."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is deployed as:
  - **Software-Based**: Runs on a **dashboard** for visualization and analysis.
  - **Data Storage**:
    - Sensor data (*I_M*, *r_out*) is streamed via MQTT and stored as **time-series data traces**.
    - Simulated data (*ˆr_M*, etc.) is generated dynamically by Simulink processing components.
  - **Hosting Environment**:
    - **No explicit cloud/edge deployment** is mentioned; likely runs on local infrastructure (e.g., robot controller or connected PC).
    - **Simulink models** are executable and likely hosted on a simulation workstation.
  - **Accessibility**:
    - Data is visualized in a **unified dashboard** for operators/engineers."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital shadow adheres to:
  - **Modeling Standards**:
    - **SysML** (for structural/behavioral modeling) as part of **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)**.
    - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** for structuring data traces, models, and processing components.
  - **Simulation Standards**:
    - **MathWorks Simulink** for executable friction and dynamics models.
  - **Data Standards**:
    - **MQTT protocol** for real-time data streaming.
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for semantic interoperability.
  - **No explicit industry standards** (e.g., IEC 62443, ISO 23224) are mentioned for cybersecurity or data privacy."
]
